buildCommand: cd web && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
